analysis: The project currently has a basic HTML structure with some CSS and JavaScript files. The event.json indicates a focus on black holes with animated objects, slides, and pages. The existing to-dos suggest incomplete implementations for animations, themes, and interactive elements. The CSS file needs to be updated to reflect a dark, cosmic theme with black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The JavaScript file needs to handle animations and interactions for the black hole theme.

improvements.description: Update the CSS file to include a dark, cosmic theme with black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Add animations for black hole visuals and ensure the theme is cohesive with the black hole topic.

Complete the JavaScript content to ensure all buttons have proper event handlers and functionality. Implement animations and interactions for the black hole theme, including animated slides and objects.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.
